name: Grilled Salmon & Cheddar Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Cheddar, medium, cut into 4 slices of 2.5 oz each
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the Cheddar Cheese into 4 slices of 2.5 oz each.
2. Mix the salmon with the onion, lemon juice, and mayonnaise.
3. Spread the mixture on thick slices of French bread.
4. Top with a slice of cheddar cheese.
5. Add another top slice of bread.
6. Butter both sides of the sandwich generously.
7. Grill until brown on one side, then turn and brown the other side until the cheese is melted.
8. Serve hot.
